case_title: SMITH, VAUGHAN et al VS KAVANAGH, JAMES ANTHONY LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,256.00 FILED BY SMITH, VAUGHAN MCIVER, BRIDGET AS TO DEFENDANT KAVANAGH, JAMES ANTHONY LLC 460 NATOMA LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO JAMES ANTHONY KAVANAGH OWNER & IND. 460 NATOMA LLC RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-09-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 WILL BE OUT OF TOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, VAUGHAN MCIVER, BRIDGET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAVANAGH, JAMES ANTHONY LLC 460 NATOMA LLC $4,256.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,283.00, JAMES ANTHONY KAVANAGH IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT, MR. JAMES ANTHONY KAVANAGH'S EXHIBIT RETURNED ON 11/15/01.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT 460 NATOMA LLC
